recommendations.title: The Toxic Avenger Part II
recommendations.overview: Melvin Junko was a nerdy weakling until he fell into a vat of toxic waste, turning him into the first ever superhuman creature from New Jersey. This time, he takes on Tokyo.

recommendations.title: Tromeo & Juliet
recommendations.overview: All the body-piercing, kinky sex, and car crashes that Shakespeare wanted but never had! Join Tromeo and Juliet as they travel through Manhattan's underground in search of climactic love, violence and the American Way.

recommendations.title: Citizen Toxie: The Toxic Avenger IV
recommendations.overview: A horrific explosion creates a dimensional portal between Tromaville and its dimensional mirror image, Amortville. While the Toxie is trapped in the mirror dimension, Tromaville comes under the control of his evil doppelganger, the Noxious Offender.

recommendations.title: Class of Nuke 'Em High
recommendations.overview: The pupils at a high school next to a nuclear power plant start acting and looking strange after buying contaminated drugs from a plant worker.

recommendations.title: Return to Nuke 'Em High Volume 1
recommendations.overview: Return to the Class of Nuke 'Em High follows a young couple that are up against the school glee club. Unfortunately, the glee club has mutated into a gang called The Cretins. When the other students begin to undergo mutations, our couple must solve t

recommendations.title: The Toxic Avenger
recommendations.overview: A gang of thugs devise a cruel hoax that goes horribly wrong as Melvin, a nerdy emaciated janitor at the local health club, is cast through a third story window into a vat of hazardous toxic waste.

recommendations.title: Return to... Return to Nuke 'Em High aka Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Volume 1,  the mutated glee club continue their violent rampage in Tromaville. Chrissy and Lauren, two innocent lesbian lovers, must fight not only the Cretins, mutants, and monsters but also the evil Tromorganic Foodstuffs Co

recommendations.title: The Toxic Avenger Part III: The Last Temptation of Toxie
recommendations.overview: Desperate to raise money for the experimental surgery that could restore his blind fiancee's eyesight, Toxie accepts a lucrative job with the evil multinational conglomerate Apocalypse Inc.

recommendations.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut

recommendations.title: Poultrygeist: Night of the Chicken Dead
